title: elaeocarpus coactilus
intro: Elaeocarpus coactilus, also known as the Mountain Apple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The Mountain Apple has been reported to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and fruits of Elaeocarpus coactilus are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
